title: Missing CSRF Protection on Account Settings
vulnerable_behavior: The vulnerable app accepts a state-changing email update request without requiring a CSRF token.
secure_behavior: The secure app rejects missing or invalid CSRF tokens with 403 Forbidden.
root_cause: The vulnerable implementation trusts authenticated POST requests but does not verify request intent with a CSRF token.
remediation: Add per-session CSRF tokens to state-changing forms and validate them server-side before processing updates.
retest_result: The secure app requires a valid CSRF token before updating account settings.
